cases.prompt: Freeze edits so I only touch the src/billing folder this session.

assertions.text: Restricts file edits to the specified directory for the session
Blocks Edit and Write outside the allowed path via the PreToolUse freeze check

cases.prompt: 이 폴더만 수정하게 잠가줘. 다른 코드 건드리지 않게.

assertions.text: Produces a session-scoped edit boundary restriction
Prevents accidentally editing unrelated code outside the chosen module
